title: Need help getting music from shin eva CD
display_title: Need help getting music from shin eva CD
wikitext:
[]: Need help getting music from shin eva CD             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Fri Feb 26, 2021 9:57 am Hello! Trying to buy the music from shin evangelion CD but I am unable to purchase it in the U.K. HMV Japan says it cannot be shipped overseas. Can anyone help?

[]: Re: Need help getting music from shin eva CD             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Feb 26, 2021 10:01 am Try CDJapan

[]: Re: Need help getting music from shin eva CD             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Feb 26, 2021 10:11 am I should warn you that the UK's new import laws require the exporter to pay the import duty to the UK government, not the importer. That means that even CDJapan may refuse to send the Shin Eva CD to the UK.

[]: Re: Need help getting music from shin eva CD             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Fri Feb 26, 2021 10:14 am Thesufferingpumpkin wrote: Hello! Trying to buy the music from shin evangelion CD but I am unable to purchase it in the U.K. HMV Japan says it cannot be shipped overseas. Can anyone help?

[]: Re: Need help getting music from shin eva CD             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Fri Feb 26, 2021 11:05 am Got it from CD Japan thank you

[]: Re: Need help getting music from shin eva CD             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Feb 26, 2021 2:22 pm CD Japan accepted my recent CD orders (shipping to UK) without comment. UrsusArctos wrote: I should warn you that the UK's new import laws require the exporter to pay the import duty to the UK government, not the importer. That means that even CDJapan may refuse to send the Shin Eva CD to the UK.

[]: Re: Need help getting music from shin eva CD             Quote Post by Lacissal » Fri Feb 26, 2021 2:44 pm For items brought from abroad (international/Non-EU) anything over £15 is supposed to have Import VAT paid on it. Plenty of small items like CDs or blurays get through but occasionally people get whacked with a 'handling fee'.

[]: Re: Need help getting music from shin eva CD             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Feb 26, 2021 4:52 pm pwhodges wrote: Actually, there are plenty of situations in which the receiving customer has to pay taxes and duty before the package will be delivered. I've had that twice so far.

[]: Re: Need help getting music from shin eva CD             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Sat Feb 27, 2021 3:59 am I paid £35 for it from cd Japan including postage

[]: Re: Need help getting music from shin eva CD             Quote Post by khronos » Sun Feb 28, 2021 3:16 am UrsusArctos wrote: I should warn you that the UK's new import laws require the exporter to pay the import duty to the UK government, not the importer. That means that even CDJapan may refuse to send the Shin Eva CD to the UK.

[]: Re: Need help getting music from shin eva CD             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Sun Feb 28, 2021 8:49 am khronos wrote: UrsusArctos#910932 wrote: I should warn you that the UK's new import laws require the exporter to pay the import duty to the UK government, not the importer. That means that even CDJapan may refuse to send the Shin Eva CD to the UK.
